slides.title: try-catch
try-catch Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
function divide($a, $b) {
    if ($b == 0) {
        throw new Exception('Division by zero');
    }
    return $a / $b;
}
try {
    echo divide(10, 2) . "\n";
    echo divide(5, 0) . "\n";
} catch (Exception $e) {
    echo 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage() . "\n";
} finally {
    echo "This always runs.";
}
?>

slides.title: The finally Block

quizData.question: What block always executes after try/catch?
quizData.explanation: finally always executes, even if an exception is thrown or not.
